positive: A cyberpunk cityscape viewed from a rainy rooftop, featuring neon Japanese signage, flying vehicles, and massive holographic advertisements. Cinematic, highly saturated colors, intricate details, cinematic lighting, vaporwave aesthetic, octane render.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, childish, muted colors, cartoon, simple background
